creator: jason-freebsd@mastaler.com
text:
MAD is a high-quality MPEG audio decoder.  All three audio layers
(Layer I, Layer II, and Layer III a.k.a. MP3) are fully implemented.
The software is distributed as a library (libmad) and command-line
front-end (madplay).

This software received the NetBSD "Package of the Month" award for
October, 2000.  (Excerpt from netbsd-announce)

  "madplay, (pkgsrc/audio/madplay) nominated by Simon Burge, Thomas
   Klausner and others, because its playback of mp3s is definitely
   audibly superior to other mp3 players."

See <http://mad.sourceforge.net/> for more information.
